abilities.description: The bioscanner contains various medical sensors to diagnose a vast number of maladies. When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.a2d7793b23c17489]{Secure an Advantage} to diagnose an injury or illness, preset your action die to 4.

When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.13b2d777c6fb719d]{Gather Information} using the bioscanner to study a lifeform, dead or alive, add +1. If you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.0d7f13818c1c19ed]{Reach a Milestone} this way, take +1 momentum.

The bioscanner holds a significant amount of data on how to treat any diagnosable malady. When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.2051538f0c9d5d27]{Heal} with knowledge provided by this tool and score a weak hit, make the cost -1 less.
When activated, the bioscanner's automated system makes it function as a small construct that aids with the work at hand. When you make a move using this tool, you may reroll one challenge die.

system.description: A portable tool used to analyze organic material.
